title: USDA Attribute Specs Production Contract
format_neutral_rules: contracts/document-model-productions/attribute-spec.contract.json#laws — field set (custom/variability/typeName required, plus optional default/timeSamples/spline/connectionPaths/allowedTokens/...), listOp subfield rules, and value-shape rules are pinned in the format-neutral production. This contract adds USDA-specific grammar dispatch and storage mapping.

storage_mapping.variability: native variability enum field, defaulting to varying when absent
storage_mapping.NamespacedName: property path component and parent propertyChildren entry

timeSamples.storage: timeSamples field as a native TimeSamples value
requirements: time sample map parsing is delegated to the value-syntax time_sample_map obligation
an attribute may author both default and timeSamples fields
None inside a sample stores a value-block sentinel
time samples are not interpolated or resolved by this parser
time samples must not be stored as string-keyed JSON/dictionary payloads
a missing ListOp token authors the explicit subfield
prepend, append, and delete author only their named subfield
None authors an empty listOp value for the selected subfield
ListOpConnect shares the leading ListOp token with ListOpRelationship and must be selected by property dispatch after reading the attribute declaration and .connect suffix
connections are stored as authored targets and are not resolved

spline.storage: spline field as a native Spline value
requirements: spline map parsing is delegated to the value-syntax spline_map obligation
spline data is stored but not evaluated
spline value type must agree with the containing attribute typeName where the type is known
spline storage must not be a JSON/dictionary payload

laws: attribute specs must be stored through usd-document-model
attribute names must be parsed through the graph identifier/name rules
right-hand side values must be delegated to usda-value-parser
known declared types must be validated or coerced according to foundational type rules
a property-level ListOp prefix must not cause an attribute .connect production to be rejected as a relationship-only form

attribute metadata accepts SharedMetadata/ListOpMetadata only; prim-only metadata keywords such as payload, references, inherits, specializes, variants, and variantSets are invalid in attribute metadata
format_neutral_laws_hoisted: variability is a native EnumVariability value, not a durable string (document-model-productions/attribute-spec.contract.json#laws)
default value type must agree with typeName when typeName names a known foundational type; mismatch is a diagnostic (document-model-productions/attribute-spec.contract.json#laws)
None authored default stores a value-block sentinel (document-model-productions/attribute-spec.contract.json#laws)
spline data is parsed and stored but never evaluated by this layer (document-model-productions/attribute-spec.contract.json#laws)
connectionPaths are authored listOps; resolution is not performed by the parser (document-model-productions/attribute-spec.contract.json#laws)

attribute specs admit only shared + attribute_only + custom; a field belonging to another spec kind is rejected and not interned as an extension field (document-model-productions/common-metadata.contract.json#spec_kind_field_admission)
golden_groups: scalar, tuple, array, matrix, and semantic alias defaults
timeSamples with blocked and numeric samples
spline map storage and duplicate item last-one-wins
